basics.name: Harisathwik Veerla
basics.label: AI Engineer
basics.summary: AI Engineer specializing in enterprise-grade GenAI applications, robust LLMOps pipelines, and inference optimization. Proven track record in reducing prediction latency by 40% and saving 25% in cloud costs through model compression and efficient architecture design.

work.name: KPMG Global Services Private Limited
work.summary: Architecting enterprise-grade GenAI applications and MLOps/LLMOps lifecycles on Azure and AWS.
highlights: Lowered prediction latency by 40% and cloud expenditure by 25% via model compression (quantization) and memory caching.
Orchestrated CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions, accelerating deployment cycles by 30%.
Designed comprehensive telemetry solutions to monitor system stability and factuality.
Built resilient streaming and batch prediction workflows with automated data integrity checks.

work.name: FEV India Private Ltd
work.summary: Spearheaded scalable ML workflows and data transformation jobs for ADAS systems.
highlights: Boosted system reliability by 35% through stringent data formatting rules and verification gates.
Cut excessive cloud spending by over 20% through resource efficiency campaigns.
Established continuous deployment practices and infrastructure-as-code via Azure DevOps.
Developed custom diagnostic dashboards for system uptime and dataset integrity.
